title: Bootstrap compiler repository
body:
Creates the standalone **compiler** repository with the Beskid workspace layout that supersedes the in-superrepo Cargo tree. This commit is the **v0.1 start** boundary (`dd75bff`, 2026-03-05).

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`dd75bff`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/dd75bff)
- **Subject:** Initial Commit
- **Completed:** 2026-03-05

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-compiler-parity`

## Relation
Opens deliverable **v01-compiler-parity** and the **compiler-foundation** workstream; every later compiler task in v0.1 builds on this bootstrap.
